arts.sum: Teenage forward keen to leave German giants in pursuit of first-team football

arts.ttl: “Reached a verbal agreement’ – Sky Sports’ Florian Plettenberg drops exciting Tottenham update
arts.sum: Tottenham have reportedly reached a verbal agreement with Bayern Munich to sign highly-rated forward Mathys Tel in a deal worth €60 million, marking a major breakthrough in the transfer saga. arts.ttl: Major Mathys Tel transfer update as Tottenham 'agree £50m deal'
arts.sum: According to reports in France, Spurs have agreed a deal with Bayern Munich to sign Mathys Tel. The 19-year-old is the subject of plenty of interest from the Premier League, with Chelsea and Manchester United also interested. The Tottenham head coach has been crying out for new signings in the January transfer window for weeks, admitting his current squad "needs help".
